title: Aharonov-Bohm interference and phase-coherent surface-state transport in topological insulator rings
type1_summary: No clearly replot-ready cleaned/source data files were identified. The deposit appears to contain article/document files and figure PDFs rather than tabular datasets.
type2_summary: No explicit raw instrument-output files were identified from the inspection reports.
classification_notes: Paper evidence indicates no data availability statement and no downloadable data links on the publisher page. The Zenodo deposit appears to be a document/figure package rather than a true data repository. Because the file inspection reports do not expose internal PDF contents, classification of the figure PDFs remains conservative.

file_classifications.reasoning: This is the paper/documentation file, not a dataset intended for plotting. It does not contain replot-ready numerical data based on the available inspection.

paper_analysis.summary: The paper reports low-temperature magnetotransport experiments on topological insulator ring and nanoribbon structures, showing Aharonov-Bohm oscillations that evidence phase-coherent quasi-ballistic transport of topological surface states.
paper_analysis.processed_plot_details: The paper appears to report experimental magnetotransport measurements on topological insulator ring and nanoribbon devices, but no associated dataset or source data files were located.
